events.change_summary: Intent check: fix root cause of incomplete paths in country mode — probe multiple candidate IPs before selecting traceroute target

events.summary: Intent check pushed: probe multiple candidate IPs in get_test_ip_for_asn to find a live host before committing to a traceroute target, eliminating the root cause of incomplete paths in ZA and other country sweeps.

events.change_summary: Full scope: root cause analysis, single-phase implementation with files and verification
Switch target selection to RIPE Atlas probe lookup — find a connected probe in the ASN and use its IP as the traceroute target

events.rationale: Bug fix in country-mode IP selection — no UI changes (skip design), well-contained to country.py and its test file (skip architecture). The Atlas probe lookup adds one helper function and updates one existing function.

alternatives_considered: TCP socket probing across multiple prefix candidates: would have worked but adds latency (500ms per candidate × 10 candidates = up to 5s per ASN worst case) and still targets arbitrary addresses rather than known-live ones
Keep existing single-prefix approach unchanged: does not fix the problem
events.decision: Use RIPE Atlas probe registry as the primary target IP source, with the existing RIPE prefix-based selection as fallback
events.rationale: Atlas probes are known-live hardware devices inside ISP networks — using a probe IP as the traceroute target eliminates the core problem (tracing to a dark address). The probes API is public, unauthenticated, and returns connected-only probes with a status filter. Prefix-based selection is retained as fallback for ASNs with no registered probes (backbone carriers, small operators).

events.summary: Full scope (revision 3): RIPE Atlas probe lookup as primary target IP strategy, existing prefix-based selection as fallback. Single phase in country.py + test updates. Bug-fix workflow, standard tier.

workflow.rationale: Bug fix in country-mode IP selection — no UI changes (skip design), well-contained to country.py and its test file (skip architecture). The Atlas probe lookup adds one helper function and updates one existing function.
